# About us

![...](data:image/png;base64,)

### About us

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/megamenu-about.webp)

### About East Ventures

East Ventures is a leading venture capital firm in Southeast Asia, backing visionary founders from Seed to Growth stage. We are committed to sustainable development and social impact through ESG-driven initiatives.

### Reports

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east-ventures-web.s3.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/01150755/image-1082.webp)

## Fraudulent notice: Impersonation of East Ventures

East Ventures has become aware of several social messaging/media accounts (e.g., WhatsApp, Telegram, etc.) fraudulently claiming to represent the firm.

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east-ventures-web.s3.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/11094043/myf1k_logo_white-1024x537.png)

An 8-week youth entrepreneurship programme for students in Singapore to execute business ideas with integrity, ownership, and accountability.

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/eco1.png)

A free web-based global greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions calculator that helps companies calculate and measure their environmental impact.

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/Frame-1171275776.png)

A collaborative movement initiated by East Ventures to support communities during crisis in Indonesia.

## What they say about us

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/mka.png)

#### Haryanto Tanjo

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/Frame-1171276133m.png)

#### Haryanto Tanjo – Moka

“You need people who believe in you even when you don’t believe in yourselves sometimes. I think I can honestly say that Willson and the East Ventures team have been our biggest supporters from the beginning until the exit.  
After the exit, I still feel like I’m a part of the East Ventures) family. I guess what Willson said is true, once an East Ventures family always an East Ventures family. So, thank you Willson and East Ventures for everything.”

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/kudo-tip-profile.png)

#### Albert Lucius

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/kudo-tiptip.png)

#### Albert Lucius – Kudo & TipTip

“East Ventures has given consistent support for the founders, which is very unique and very different than many other VC’s that I have been working with. Thank you East Ventures for the support and I hope we can work together for a long time in the future.”

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/rgb.png)

#### Iman Usman

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Frame-1171276133.png)

#### Iman Usman – Ruangguru

“What we truly appreciate and what we have witnessed as well is all about East Ventures’ true passion for building Indonesia. A lot of decisions that we made as partners have always been about what is the benefit for Indonesia. And I think not every investor has that value. So thank you so much, East Ventures, for all the continued support.”

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/mercari-profile.png)

#### Shintaro Yamada

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/mercari.png)

#### Shintaro Yamada – Mercari

“East Ventures has supported us from the very beginning, not only in terms of funding, but also by providing us with invaluable business know-how. Their continued support has helped open the door for Mercari to take on the challenge of expanding on a global scale.”

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/sirclo-profile.png)

#### Ferry Tenka

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/sirclo123.png)

#### Ferry Tenka – Sirclo

“Throughout the 14 years of my career and journey in the tech industry, I have gone through ups and downs, tough times, through all different seasons. I have built many different startups, different companies, but one thing that has consistent is the support of East Ventures.”

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/xendit-profile.png)

#### Moses Lo

![](data:image/png;base64,)
![](https://east.vc/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/xendit.png)

#### Moses Lo – Xendit

“East Ventures was an integral part of helping us and teaching us how to navigate Southeast Asia well. Now that we do US$ 50 billion transactions across the region, it has become the lesson that we have taken and learned from what we have been told here.”

### Take your business to the next stage

We’re looking for visionary founders ready to disrupt industries and bring impact. Submit your pitch and let’s build the future together.
